---
name: KEYFRAME GENERATION
description: This prompt generates a sequence of 5 keyframes for an 8-bit retro video game combat animation, where Vic, a purple octopus character blocks and counters a robotic enemy's punch attack in a side-scrolling platformer style scene.
---

# 1. Scene Setup

Create an 8-bit retro video game scene inspired by classic NES games like Super Mario Bros.

Use the provided BACKGROUND REFERENCE IMAGE as the environment for the scene.

Use the provided MAIN CHARACTER REFERENCE IMAGE and MAIN CHARACTER REFERENCE SIDE VIEW IMAGE of the purple pixel octopus as the playable character sprite.

The octopus character is positioned slightly left of center, facing right in a ready stance.

A pixel-art robotic enemy stands on the right side of the screen preparing to attack.

Style: authentic NES-era pixel art, side-scrolling platformer perspective, limited color palette, blocky terrain, crisp pixel outlines, retro arcade aesthetic.

# 2. Start Attack

The robotic enemy lunges forward from the right side with a punch attack animation.

The octopus character begins raising its front tentacles defensively.

# 3. Attack Block

The robot's punch collides with the octopus's raised tentacles. The octopus successfully blocks the attack by having the two raised tentacles glow red. The robot recoils slightly from the blocked attack while the octopus remains stable in a defensive stance.

# 4. Recoil

The robot recoils from the blocked attack while the octopus remains stable in a defensive stance.

The octopus tentacles are still raised after the block but not glowing red.

# 5. Victory

The robot enemy is knocked back or stunned and leaves the frame. The octopus character performs a small victory animation.
